deepseek.description: Non-thinking mode model for general chat, tool calling, and JSON output. Optimized for fast, efficient responses.
Thinking mode model with built-in reasoning capabilities before responding. Ideal for complex problem-solving, math, and coding tasks.
Experimental version introducing DeepSeek Sparse Attention (DSA) for improved long-context training and inference efficiency.
Reasoning-focused model with performance comparable to OpenAI's o1. Excels at mathematics, coding, and complex logical tasks.
Enhanced version of DeepSeek-R1 with improved reasoning stability.
Legacy base model (671B parameters, 37B active). Strong performance across coding, math, and general knowledge tasks.

openai.description: Latest fast, small model optimized for coding and low-latency workloads. Supports text and image inputs, tool use, function calling, and has a 400k context window.
Ultra-fast, cost-efficient model for low-latency workflows. Available only via API.
Most advanced GPT-5-series model offering maximum reasoning depth and reliability for mission-critical tasks.
Specialized model for complex coding and software engineering tasks.
Flagship reasoning model. Expert-level responses, choosing when to use deeper reasoning for complex tasks.
Balanced model for real-time experiences, agents, and everyday tasks requiring reasoning.
Ultra-low-latency reasoning model focused on speed.
OpenAI's previous flagship model for complex tasks across domains.
Balanced model offering a mix of intelligence, speed, and cost.
Omni model supporting text and image inputs. NOTE: Deprecated in ChatGPT as of Feb 2026, but still available via API.
Streamlined, affordable model for fast, multimodal reasoning tasks.
Reasoning model designed for complex problem-solving and science tasks.
Advanced reasoning model for agentic workflows and deep analytical tasks.
Faster, cost-efficient reasoning model for technical tasks.
Large open-source model from OpenAI for general reasoning.
Smaller open-source model from OpenAI for efficient fine-tuning.

yandexgpt.description: Fast, lightweight version for simple, routine tasks with low latency requirements.
Base model balancing speed and quality for a wide range of business applications.
Most powerful version for complex reasoning, creative tasks, and deep analytics.

google_gemini.description: Flagship model for deep reasoning, complex projects, and nuanced collaboration (multimodal).
Speed-optimized model for low-latency interactions and real-time applications.
High-performance model for advanced reasoning, complex tasks, and high-quality content generation.
Fast, efficient model for responsive workflows and large-scale production use.
Lightweight, low-cost model for simple tasks and high-throughput processing.
Versatile workhorse for everyday tasks with strong multimodal capabilities.
Cost-efficient model for high-volume, text-heavy tasks.
Long-context model (up to 2M tokens) for processing vast amounts of data.
Fast and efficient model for high-frequency tasks with a large context window.

gigachat.description: Largest, most powerful flagship model (702B total, 36B active). Excels at complex reasoning, mathematics, and coding. Open-source under MIT license.
Fast, efficient Mixture-of-Experts model (10B total, 1.8B active). Quality on par with GPT-4o, optimized for speed and local deployment. Open-source.
Premium model for complex tasks requiring high accuracy and deep understanding.
Standard model balancing performance and efficiency for general-purpose tasks.
Lightweight, low-latency model for simple queries and high-volume automation.
